name: polyglot
title: Polyglot
description: Bilingual RU⇄EN translator: detects the direction itself and adds a learning breakdown
author: makarurbanov

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.subtitle: Polyglot
commands.description: Translate RU⇄EN with automatic direction and an explanation block

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Free key — aistudio.google.com → Get API key (free tier)

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.description: Gemini model ID. Default gemini-2.5-flash. Free tier: gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-flash-lite, gemini-3.5-flash

preferences.name: explanationLanguage
preferences.title: Explanation Language
preferences.description: Language of the explanation block (e.g. Russian, English, German)

preferences.name: alwaysExplain
preferences.title: Always Explain
preferences.label: Always show the explanation block
preferences.description: Force the block even for simple, unambiguous phrases (overrides the automatic display rules)
